name: Lemonade Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sweetened condensed milk and thawed lemonade (do not make the lemonade as directed on the can).
2. Refrigerate the mixture for 10 minutes.
3. Fold in the cool whip.
4. Pour the filling into the prepared graham cracker crusts.
5. Refrigerate the pies for at least two hours, or longer.
6. Keep refrigerated after serving.
7. Optional: Add food color to the mix before pouring into the pie crusts.
